metadata.description: Founder OS plugin and operating-system tools for owners

plugins.name: founder-os
plugins.description: Operating system for owners: 4 role modes, 44 skills, 26 commands, execution queue with 3-item ACTIVE cap, substrate health check, voice and brand profiles, business-context loader, brain log, knowledge notes, stable entry IDs, token-aware progressive query, opt-in observation log, graph query, audit report, stall detection, revenue loop enforcement, readiness check, source ingest, wiki lint, wiki graph builder, approval gates, delivery ship checks, legal reference layer, runtime brain snapshot, brain-pass synthesis, today brief wrapper, and a natural-language menu of capabilities tailored to current state
